preamble:
Introduction The content of this service description (Chapter 1) is used to compile a service catalog that is used in the contract with the client. This introduction and document history below are for internal use only. It is allowed to merge Chapter 1 with other service descriptions into a single service catalog. Modifying the content of Chapter 1 for individual clients is not allowed. (If necessary, any adjustments can only be made with approval from the responsible service owner of product manager.) service_summary: The SAN & storage device management service is a Cegeka managed service which consist of the monitoring, management, maintenance, supervision, administration and planning of all functions for Storage systems.
standard service components:
The following standard features are included in this Service:
General activities
Daily operations and administration
